lines: +// `offset 3m` at time=00:06 evaluates at 00:03, reproducing instant_last_over_time_clients with a step label of 00:06.
+// `offset 5m` evaluates each step 5m in the past, so the [00:25,00:30] range reproduces the
+// no-offset [00:20,00:25] values, shifted 5m forward in the step labels.
+// Negative `offset -5m` (look ahead) evaluates each step 5m in the future, so the [00:15,00:20] range
+// reproduces the same no-offset [00:20,00:25] values, shifted 5m earlier in the step labels.
+         * Support for the PromQL {@code offset} modifier, implemented as a constant time shift of the evaluation
+         * timestamp. Heterogeneous offsets within a single source-backed binary operator remain unsupported.
* Support for the {@code TS_COLLAPSE} pipe command, which collapses PromQL results
* into one multi-valued row per series.
